description: LMM.best - Ranking and review platform for Large Multimodal Models

userStories.title: Add hero section with animations
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see an impressive hero section with animated stats and tagline.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays with large serif headline
Animated stats show: 47 Models, 12 Benchmarks, 2.1M+ Tests
Staggered fade-up animations on page load

userStories.title: Implement leaderboard table with scoring
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see models ranked with scores and tier badges.
acceptanceCriteria: Table shows 8 models with rank, name, vendor, tier badge, score bar, parameters, context
Score bars animate on scroll into view
Tier badges: S (gold), A (silver), B (bronze) displayed

userStories.title: Build model review cards grid
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see detailed model reviews with specs and pros/cons.
acceptanceCriteria: 4 model cards displayed in responsive grid
Each card shows: name, vendor, star rating, specs (params, context, vision, audio)
Cards animate in with stagger on scroll

userStories.title: Add navigation and footer
userStories.description: As a user, I want to navigate between sections and see footer info.
acceptanceCriteria: Sticky nav with backdrop blur and logo
Smooth scroll to sections on nav click

userStories.title: Add responsive design for mobile
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the site to work well on small screens.
acceptanceCriteria: Leaderboard hides less important columns on mobile
Cards grid becomes single column on mobile
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
